The amount of pressure applied to the tube will dictate how much mud you need for larger or smaller bead. These applicators are machined from solid billet aluminum and are very accurate as their Delrin wheels glide along the wall. Features: Hand made from U.S. aluminum and steel components Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada There are currently no resources for this product.

Name: Columbia Predator Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper
Description: The Predator is the world’s first Carbon Fiber Taper and the benefits that come with this are endless. The Columbia Taper is a precision built tool that has been perfected over 38 years, but now it is also significantly lighter than all other tapers on the market and dent proof. This tool will tape flats and angles effortlessly year after year. From less drag in the corners to our easy to remove cap for cleaning, this tool will not let you down. Stainless steel side plates and cable drum and creaser arms offer a lifetime of corrosion resistance. The Patent Pending Pump Action cutting sleeve gives the operator a smoother glide over teflon bearings, superb grip and the pull ring is great for higher ceilings. The Predator maintains it’s stable temperature and remains warm to the touch. Every taper comes standard with an adjustable brake and quick release for tape changing. The Titanium pull rod is just another detail that adds style and edge to this innovative, unique taper. If you are serious about taping and care how a taper feels and performs this is the one for you. Features: Handmade from Carbon Fiber and steel components Titanium pull rod Adjustable Brake Quick release for tape changing Reduced Drag system for corners Stainless steel side plates, creaser arms and cable drum Quick release cap NEW Very smooth Patent Pending Pump Action cutting system with a roller chain 53″ in length Machined in our state of the art factory in Canada There are currently no resources for this product.

Name: Columbia 48" 180-Grip Flat Box Handle
Description: The New 48" Feather Weight 180º handle allows for a full braking capability over the entire 180º angle span. Grips the axle with a tremendous amount of pressure to eliminate the possibility of slippage when dealing with difficult angle situations. As a result, this produces cleaner, quicker and more efficient application of joint compound. A very versatile design that provides the best possible braking at any angle. Extra strong billet aluminum design for years of rugged usage. Less moving parts mean less breakdowns. These handles feature strong billet aluminum design with black metal anodizing, and laser engraving. Everything you want in a box handle combined with a feather weight, large diameter (1 1/4" diameter) tube - helps you achieve the perfect balance, and perfect finish. Name: Columbia 12" Stainless Steel Mud Pan
Description: Introducing the Columbia Mud Pan—the first in our new line of premium hand tools, designed for professionals who demand durability, comfort, and performance. Crafted from heavy-gauge stainless steel, this mud pan is built to withstand the toughest tasks, while its watertight, laser-welded seams ensure long-lasting reliability. With tapered ends and sides for a secure grip, this tool is ready to handle any job with ease. Plus, every Columbia Mud Pan comes with a free soft, non-slip rubber grip for enhanced comfort and ease of use. Now available in three convenient sizes—12″, 14″, and 16″—there’s a Columbia Mud Pan perfect for any project. The mud pans are sold in packs of 6 to dealers, but you have the flexibility to sell them individually to your customers. Lifetime Warranty: We stand by the quality and craftsmanship of our products. Each Columbia Mud Pan is backed by a lifetime warranty, ensuring you can rely on it for years of hard work. Key Features: Heavy-Gauge Stainless Steel: Engineered for strength and longevity, this mud pan resists wear and tear for reliable, long-term use. Watertight Laser-Welded Seams: Prevents leaks, even under heavy-duty conditions, for consistent performance. Comfortable Grip: Tapered ends and sides provide a secure, ergonomic hold for better control and comfort. Straight Edges: Ideal for wiping joint knives clean, ensuring a mess-free and efficient work process. Complimentary Rubber Grip: Every Columbia Mud Pan comes with a FREE soft, non-slip rubber grip for enhanced comfort and ease of use—adding even more value to this already premium tool

Name: Columbia Sawed Off Mini PREDATOR Automatic Taper
Description: Columbia Taping Tools introduces the world's first Mini Carbon Fiber Taper, The Predator "Sawed Off" Mini. Unlike other taper bodies made mostly from aluminum, the Predator's Carbon Fiber construction, makes this precision-engineered tool 20% lighter and more durable then any standard mini taper on the market. Another unique benefit of this Dent Proof construction, is that Carbon Fiber maintains temperature stability, meaning this taper will remain warm to the touch. The 6 wheel cutting sleeve has been updated in favor of teflon sliders which gives the operator a smoother glide and better grip. Now, changing the sliders out is simple field maintenance and can be installed with a standard screwdriver in minutes as opposed to half an hour or more. The pull ring is ideal for higher ceilings. The Predator will tape flats and angles effortlessly with less drag in the corners. The quick release cap makes cleaning a breeze and the stainless steel side plates, cable drum, and creaser arms offer a lifetime of corrosion resistance. With style, functionality, and durability the Predator from Columbia takes the -Evolution of Taping- to a whole new level. Description: Not all Wing Bolts used on stilts are created equal.  Our customers love that we use special stop/spring washers on each of our Wing Bolts to ensure a secure fit without damaging the main body, or loosening over time.  We are the originators of the "Double Wing Bolt System", and each individual stilt we offer uses two wing bolts on the front, and two wing bolts on the back - 4 per stilt/8 total Wing Bolts per pair of stilts (except sizes 15"-23" and 16"-24" stilts, which use 2 per stilt/4 total Wing Bolts per pair).   This kit includes 4 total Wing Bolts, each with a washer.  If you want to replace all of your Wing Bolts on stilts utilizing our "Double Wing Bolt" system (all stilts sized 18"-30", 20"-30", 21"-31", 24"-40" or 26"-40", regardless of model), you will need to order a quantity of two (8 Wing Bolts).  For sizes 15"-23" and 16"-24" stilts, you will only need to order a quantity of one (4 Wing Bolts). Name: TapeTech EasyClean Loading Pump
Description: The TapeTech 76TT EasyClean® Loading Pump combines reliability with innovation. The 76TT features the slim tube design preferred by professional finishers and robust construction for dependable performance and long life. The TapeTech 76TT Loading Pump has a redesigned head and a new Twist-lock foot valve that provides secure attachment and easy removal for cleaning and maintenance. And the 76TT does not require a paper gasket for the filler adapter or gooseneck due to an innovative, integrated O-Ring that provides a terrific seal with fewer headaches from lost, worn or damaged paper gaskets. The 76TT pump accepts the standard 85T gooseneck and 90T filler adapter. Features Fills Automatic Tapers (with 85T gooseneck) Fills finishing boxes, MudRunner®, corner applicators and nail spotters (with 90T filler adapter) There are currently no resources for this product.

Name: TapeTech Extension Handle
Description: TapeTech is the first company to introduce an interchangeable handle system that allows one support handle to be used with every tool. Whether you use standard, fixed length fiberglass handles or aluminum extension support handles, you’ll need just one base handle. The base handle for the fiberglass system is model FHTT. The base handle for the extension handle system is model XHTT. The base handle fits the corner roller, corner applicator and nail spotter without any adapters. The heavy duty, easy-to-change adapter (CFA-TT) connects the new handles to the corner finishers, and the new, optimal diameter makes TapeTech handles the most ergonomic in the industry. Both base handles feature a D-shaped fitting that securely positions the handle in the Corner Applicator and positively prevents the tool from rotating during use. Note: If you use your current Nail Spotters with the new handle system you will need to mount the handle in the back holes of the tabs on the Nail Spotter. Name: TapeTech Filler Adapter

Name: TapeTech EasyClean Automatic Taper
Description: The TapeTech 07TT EasyClean® Automatic Taper redefines quality, durability and value. The Taper simultaneously applies tape and the correct amount of joint compound for all drywall joints - dramatically improving taping efficiency. The EasyClean® cover plate can be removed with just a quarter turn for quick and easy cleaning or service. Name: TapeTech Portable Hot Wire Foam Cutter
Description: The TapeTech EHWJS100 Portable Jobsite Hot Wire is the industry’s most portable and versatile hot wire machine. Ideally suited for EIFS and other foam-cutting professional, the EHWJS100 quickly cuts and notches EPS and XPS foam with unmatched precision. The EHWJS100 weighs just 30 pounds and sets up in under 2 minutes. It can make straight through cuts, including ripping thicker panels to thinner dimensions, miter cuts, bevel cuts, compound miters and notches in the face or end of foam panels. The superalloy NiChrome hot wire heats to 932°F (500°C) in seconds to make any jobsite a highly productive foam-cutting environment. Features a spring-loaded safety switch.
